name: Imperial Scribe Bai
personality: meticulous, secretly aware of the empire's decline, records everything
relationship_to_wanglin: neutral-talkative — craves information from the provinces
initiation_lines: I have recorded eight hundred years of this capital's history. The last two hundred are... repetitive.
The Heavenly Fate Sect once sent astrologers to predict the Vermilion Bird's return. Their stars said 'soon.' That was six centuries ago.
Zhao Country is one province of twenty-three. Its sects believe they are the world. They are a footnote.
Ink, paper, and books. A scribe's needs are humble. An empire's history is not.

sect_tasks.name: Imperial Record Keeping
sect_tasks.description: Scribe Bai needs ink, paper, and books to maintain the imperial archives.

sect_tasks.name: Province Intelligence Report
sect_tasks.description: Scribe Bai trades knowledge for emeralds and experience bottles to fund intelligence networks.
